response.justification: Bogdan is technically well-suited — TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs, AWS, and Kubernetes all present — and is Berlin-based, which satisfies the high on-site requirement. However, he is a Staff Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience across embedded systems, high-throughput microservices, AI-agent infrastructure, and open-source platform founding. Placing him in a junior/mid individual contributor role risks rapid disengagement, and his compensation expectations almost certainly exceed the position's band. The fit is strong on skills but severely mismatched on seniority.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise well above the required threshold, with React usage confirmed at Tencent
AWS (CDK, cloud deployments) and Kubernetes experience cover multiple nice-to-have qualifications outright
Current AI-agent and MCP work at Naver directly addresses the LLM/API integration nice-to-have
concerns: Dramatically overqualified — Staff Engineer applying for an entry/mid role creates high attrition risk and likely compensation mismatch
PostgreSQL not mentioned anywhere; database experience is MongoDB, MySQL, and generic SQL
NestJS, the specified backend framework, is absent from the resume despite extensive Node.js history
